data.title: 国际服主线Vol.6 第一章 更新
data.summary: [Main Story Announcement] Vol.6 'Oratorio of Days Gone By' Ch.1 「 Sights Beyond the Boundary 」 is co
data.body:
[Main Story Announcement]

Vol.6 'Oratorio of Days Gone By'
Ch.1 「 Sights Beyond the Boundary 」 is coming soon, Sensei!

Please look forward to it!

#BlueArchive
